markets.rules_secondary: This market resolves to Yes if the team qualifies for the NCAA Tournament Round of 64. Teams that receive an NCAA tournament bid but are placed in the First Four must win their First Four game to be considered qualified for the Round of 64. Teams that lose in the First Four do not qualify. This will be determined by whether or not they qualify; if they qualify but do not end up competing, the market will still resolve to Yes.
